mentions.note: Confusing down-move despite solid earnings beat and guidance raise; market convinced payroll processors doomed by AI despite CFO seeing no discernable impact; fundamentals fine but sentiment terrible.

Down 1.5% on what looked like solid beat and raise; Wall Street convinced payroll processors doomed by AI; CFO says not seeing meaningful AI impact; market dismisses reassurance; broader job slowdown adding pressure; now up 25% from highs but 'house of pain' for now.

AI hype incorrectly targeting payroll processors like Paychex; market fears software could replace ADP. However, IRS compliance requirements mean company can't be fully displaced. Caught in AI panic but not existential threat.
